category_sources: source_facts.description identifies an implementation of SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hash algorithms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sha2; current_curation.display-name is sha2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and is the best available official documentation surface for this tarball-distributed utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive point to the official author site, but no official source-control repository URL is provided.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists sha2; source_facts.description names SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hash algorithms.
